prompt: Register a travel expense for employee Sarah Johnson (sarah.johnson@example.org). The trip was titled "Client Visit to Oslo" on 2026-03-10. Add expenses: flight 3200 NOK, hotel 1850 NOK, taxi 450 NOK.
notes: Travel expense with multiple cost lines in English. Tests /travelExpense with multiple expense entries. Agent may need to create separate cost entries or a single expense with total.
